name: auth-oauth-buttons
description: Branded Google, Apple, GitHub, and Microsoft OAuth sign-in buttons with loading states and multiple variants
postMessage:
OAuth buttons installed!

Usage:
import { OAuthButtons } from '@/components/auth-oauth-buttons/oauth-buttons'

<OAuthButtons onProviderClick={(provider) => signIn(provider)} />

Variants: "default" (branded colors), "outline" (neutral), "icon-only" (compact)

Requires shadcn/ui: npx shadcn@latest add button
